title: stenogyne scrophularioides var. nelsonii
intro: Stenogyne scrophularioides var. nelsonii is a rare and endemic plant species found in Hawaii, also known as the 'Ohia ha leaf or Ha leaf, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as wound healing and skin protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be dried and used in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Stenogyne scrophularioides var. nelsonii include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional Hawaiian medicine.
